skills.summary: Content ingestion into the local Codex brain corpus.
skills.notes: Adapted into file-backed page creation and updates under `brain/` with category-based routing and explicit source handling.

skills.summary: Brain-grounded question answering over the local Codex brain substrate.
skills.notes: Adapted into file-backed search and page reads using the local `brain/` corpus plus deterministic helper scripts.

skills.summary: Brain-health and consistency maintenance workflow.
skills.notes: Adapted into package-health and corpus-health maintenance using repo checks, targeted audits, and timestamped maintenance reports.

skills.summary: Entity enrichment workflow over the local Codex brain corpus.
skills.notes: Adapted into file-backed page improvement with compiled-truth updates, timeline additions, and explicit citations.

skills.summary: Daily briefing workflow using Codex connectors, local notes, and explicit source handling.
skills.notes: Maps GBrain page lookups into Codex calendar, Gmail, local files, and explicit coverage-gap notes.

skills.summary: Migration workflow for importing external note or wiki systems into a future Codex memory target.
skills.notes: Adapted into a sample-first migration and verification workflow for Codex-side files or a future substrate.

skills.summary: Setup workflow for a future Codex-side GBrain substrate.
skills.notes: Adapted into package setup, file conventions, and substrate-preparation guidance for Codex.

skills.summary: Publishing workflow for shareable GBrain-derived outputs.
skills.notes: Adapted into a file-based publishing and sharing workflow for reports, memos, and exported pages.

skills.summary: Explicit signal capture workflow for ideas and entity mentions.
skills.notes: Adapted from always-on sidecar behavior into a deliberate local-brain capture flow backed by `scripts/brain_capture_signal.py`.

skills.summary: Brain-first read-enrich-write operating loop.
skills.notes: Adapted into an explicit workflow over the local `brain/` corpus using search, write, backlink, and citation helpers.

skills.summary: Link and idea ingestion with entity cross-linking.
skills.notes: Adapted into local-file ingest with preserved raw artifacts, author page updates, and explicit related-entity propagation.

skills.summary: Media ingestion workflow for PDFs, transcripts, screenshots, and repo notes.
skills.notes: Adapted into text-bearing media ingest for artifacts already readable by Codex, with raw preservation and follow-on enrichment.

skills.summary: Meeting transcript ingestion workflow with propagation to attendees and companies.
skills.notes: Adapted into file-backed meeting-page creation plus attendee and company backlink propagation via `scripts/brain_ingest_meeting.py`.

skills.summary: Citation audit and repair workflow for the local brain corpus.
skills.notes: Adapted into deterministic citation auditing and markup normalization via `scripts/brain_citations.py`.

skills.summary: Repo-filing rules for where future GBrain port artifacts belong in this package.
skills.notes: Adapts upstream brain filing into package-architecture guidance for this repo.

skills.summary: Structured skill-authoring workflow for expanding the GBrain port cleanly.
skills.notes: Updates the registry and docs instead of the upstream manifest-plus-resolver pair.

skills.summary: Task lifecycle workflow for a repo-local or user-selected task file.
skills.notes: Maps brain task pages into a simpler Codex-side task tracker.

skills.summary: Morning-prep workflow using calendar, tasks, and open-thread context.
skills.notes: Uses Codex connectors and local task state rather than GBrain page queries.

skills.summary: Secondary-review and quality-gate workflow for complex outputs.
skills.notes: Adapted into a second-pass review workflow using Codex-native review patterns and explicit disagreement reporting.

skills.summary: Codex-native automation scheduling guidance for recurring work, heartbeats, and cron automations.
skills.notes: Preserves thin prompts, staggering, quiet-hours thinking, and idempotent recurring work while mapping raw cron into Codex automation primitives.

skills.summary: Timestamped local report workflow with stable categories and latest-report lookup.
skills.notes: Adapts page-based report storage into file-based report storage inside or alongside the repo.

skills.summary: Skill-conformance workflow for validating the growing combined GStack and GBrain surface.
skills.notes: Maps upstream conformance checks onto this repo's registries, docs, and validation scripts.

skills.summary: Identity and operating-cadence audit workflow.
skills.notes: Adapted into a file-generating workflow for local identity, user, access, and cadence documents.

skills.summary: External event to brain-signal transformation workflow.
skills.notes: Adapted into offline JSON payload replay, transform, and dead-letter handling through `scripts/brain_transform_event.py`.

skills.summary: Structured research workflow for tracked data extraction and reporting.
skills.notes: Adapted into a research-to-tracker workflow using files, reports, connectors, and explicit source archives.
